heroTitle: The oldest form of botanical medicine there is
heroDesc: Guided walks in nature with a clinical herbalist. Identify plants, discover their medicinal uses, and reconnect with the seasonality that our ancestors knew by heart.
openingTitle: Nature is not a backdrop — it is a pharmacy
openingP1: For millennia, human beings learned to know the plants around them. They knew what relieved fever, what calmed anxiety, what accelerated the healing of a wound. This knowledge was passed from generation to generation.
openingP2: We lost it in a few decades. These walks are a way to find it again — one plant at a time, one season at a time, in the green spaces we pass through without seeing them.
